summary: All 5 workers completed successfully. Comprehensive audit of Agent Pulse monitoring reveals several implementation gaps and quality issues.
key_findings: Critical gap: squad_leads_running not sourced in monitor; only launched vs target shown
workers_running has no fallback reconciliation; can silently underreport as zero if telemetry stale
Launcher handoff uses non-atomic writes for fleet.json and swarm-state.json initial seeding; race conditions possible
Child-agent telemetry stored but not presented in monitor UI; child-agents.jsonl not parsed for display
Smoke test has partial coverage only; does not validate live pulse updates, monitor UI, or count accuracy
README documentation claims are accurate; implementation verified for live monitoring, nested progress, telemetry tracking, and heartbeat display
consensus_notes: All workers found implementation gaps. Strong consensus on: (1) squad_leads_running missing from monitor, (2) launcher handoff atomicity issues, (3) smoke test insufficient for Agent Pulse features, (4) child telemetry UI gap.
conflict_notes: No conflicts. All findings complementary across different audit focus areas.
